name: hit rate coefficient
sensitivity: Medium - changes tie and score behavior

name: promote decision rank priority
formula_or_transform: sort by decision boolean then score

name: walk-forward positive momentum rule
formula_or_transform: include next return only when signal positive

name: require live env flag
formula_or_transform: requires LIVE_TRADING_ENABLED true when live enabled

name: require broker health
formula_or_transform: reject if broker health check failed

name: freshness positive seconds rule
formula_or_transform: status fresh if positive else expired
